description: VT examination report as a HUD form: 'VISUAL EXAMINATION REPORT' header band with part/procedure/date fields; 3-row findings table (LOCATION / OBSERVATION / TERM / DISPOSITION) carrying the INDICATION -> DISCONTINUITY -> DEFECT terminology ladder with EVALUATE/ACCEPT/REJECT chips; glowing word-slot pulse on the term cell; AWS D1.1 Table 6.1 acceptance-criteria line; examiner signature (draw-on) and VT-2 / NAS 410 certification stamp.
